title: micromeria peltieri
intro: Micromeria peltieri, also known as Corsican mint or Creeping mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive benefits. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its high antioxidant and antibacterial content. Herbal preparations of Micromeria peltieri include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
